---
name: General inquiry
about: Questions, improvements, documentation updates, discussions, or anything not covered by bug reports or feature requests.
title: "docs(scope): <short description>"
labels: help wanted, question
assignees: aditya-goyal01
---

**Describe the topic**
A clear and concise description of the topic, concern, or suggestion.

**Reason / Context**
A clear and concise explanation of why this is relevant or important to the project.

**Proposed action**
A clear and concise description of any suggested solution or next steps, if applicable.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, supporting details, references, or screenshots here.
